description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular shape and clean lines. The exterior is primarily finished in a light wood grain, complemented by white framing along the edges and top. The front face displays two spacious drawers, each equipped with a sleek, horizontal bar pull handle in a metallic finish. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood texture without any additional ornamentation. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. There are no visible locks, branding, or decorative embellishments beyond the contrasting materials and handles.
description: A modern, two-drawer chest with a light wood finish, white trim, and metallic bar handles. Its clean, minimalist design features a flat top and unadorned sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with metallic bar handles and white trim framing the wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood-textured panel bordered by white trim, with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a continuous wood grain panel with white trim at the top, no handles or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wood-textured panel and white trim.
